description: You are building a driver for an industrial automation controller. Implement a Python-based Modbus RTU protocol stack within the `modbus/` package that passes the provided `pytest` suite. Your implementation must handle CRC-16 calculation, RTU frame construction and parsing, exception responses, and Function Codes 01 (Read Coils), 03 (Read Holding Registers), 06 (Write Single Register), and 16 (Write Multiple Registers). Do not modify any files in the `tests/` directory and do not use third-party Modbus libraries.
